About: It is about a Sunni Muslim dynasty that controlled present-day Morocco from the mid-13th to the 15th century.
Affects: It affects parts of North Africa (Algeria and Tunisia) and of the southern Iberian Peninsula (Spain) around Gibraltar.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the Banu Marin tribe.
BelongsTo: It belongs to the Zenata Berber tribe.
HasA: It has a culturally Arabized dynasty of Berber origin.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by sponsoring Maliki Sunnism as the official religion.
HeldIn: It was held in the southern Iberian Peninsula.
Influenced: It influenced the policy of the Emirate of Granada.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by the Almohads.
IsA: It is a Sunni Muslim dynasty.
It is a culturally Arabized dynasty of Berber origin.
KnownFor: It is known for pioneering the construction of madrasas across the country.
LocatedIn: It is located in present-day Morocco.
It is located in present-day Algeria.
It is located in present-day Tunisia.
It is located in the southern Iberian Peninsula.
MemberOf: It is a member of the Zenata Berber tribe.
NamedAfter: It is named after the Banu Marin tribe.
OccurredAt: It occurred at Marrakesh.
It occurred at Algeciras.
It occurred at Fez.
It occurred at Rabat.
It occurred at Salé.
It occurred at Meknes.
It occurred at Sijilmassa.
It occurred at Taza.
It occurred at Ksar el-Kebir.
It occurred at Oujda.
OccurredBetween: It occurred between the 13th and 14th centuries.
OccurredIn: It occurred in the southern Iberian Peninsula.
OccurredOn: It occurred on 16 July 1212.
It occurred on 1340.
It occurred on 1344.
It occurred on 1269.
It occurred on 1276.
It occurred on 1310.
It occurred on 1331.
It occurred on 1337.
It occurred on 1347.
It occurred on 1348.
OccurredAround: It occurred around the mid-13th century.
It occurred around the mid-14th century.
It occurred around the early 15th century.
OriginatedIn: It originated in the Banu Marin tribe.
It originated in the Zenata Berber tribe.
PartOf: It is part of the Zenata confederation.
UsedIn: It is used in the construction of madrasas.
UsedTo: It is used to promote the education of Maliki ulama.
